title: Allow Main Task status changes to affect Subitem Tasks
excerpt:
If I have a task with numerous subtasks, and I mark the parent task “Done,” it would be ideal for the subtasks to all become marked “Done” as well. 
Currently, if I try to create an automation When “Status” changes to “D…

posts.author: ITBill (Bill Moller)
posts.cookedHtml:
If I have a task with numerous subtasks, and I mark the parent task “Done,” it would be ideal for the subtasks to all become marked “Done” as well.

Currently, if I try to create an automation When “Status” changes to “Done” Then set “…” ← I want to choose Subitem Status here, but I receive the error, “Your previous selections don’t include subitem context.”

posts.author: bfoy (Brad  Foy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Same issue here…
I also cannot select subitem status…

Screenshot 2023-10-02 at 9.31.52 AM968×309 24.3 KB

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @bfoy & @ITBill

We developed an app that solves this exact pain point of subitems inherting column value from parent. It’s called Subitem Automations and it allows to do this on subitem creation and when the parent item changes, here’s an example -

On change - In your case, “when status changes”

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.30.162106×432 27.6 KB

On creation - Populate item’s data into its subitems in a seamless way

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.31.152226×400 30.1 KB

It’s brand new (released last month) and we’re going to keep on adding new capabilities.

You can find it in the monday.com marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/10000287

Hope that helps! If you have any questions I’m available at daniel@fantasymedia.io

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

You can do that easily with our Subitems Pro Automations app. It includes an automation that allows you to copy an item’s column value to a selected column in all its subitems:

image334×259 8.39 KB

If you have any questions or requests for custom automations, feel free to reach out to us!
